zh.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon是Ralph Vernon的女兒，出生。她至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon是Ralph Vernon的女儿，出生。她至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Eustachia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon was born as the daughter of Ralph Vernon. She had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon est née, fille de Ralph Vernon. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon wurde, als Tochter von Ralph Vernon geboren. Sie hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon è nata il come figlia di Ralph Vernon. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachia De VernonはRalph Vernonの娘として生まれた。彼女は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon(은)는 Ralph Vernon의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon nasceu filha de Ralph Vernon. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon родилась. Её отца звали Ralph Vernon. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Eustachia De Vernon nació como hija de Ralph Vernon. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
